leads.issues: The homepage repeats the exact same list of neighborhoods (Northern Liberties, Fishtown, Old City, Society Hill, South Street, Olde Kensington, Queen Village, South Jersey) in near-identical wording across at least four separate paragraphs - a keyword-stuffing pattern that reads unnaturally to visitors and can actually work against modern SEO rather than help it.
leads.opportunity: Rewriting the homepage copy once - clean, warm, and specific - and letting the site's existing service pages and proper on-page structure carry the neighborhood targeting instead of repeating it four times is a same-week fix. Expected within 30 days: a more trustworthy first impression for new pet owners searching in Philly, without the thin-content risk.

leads.email_body:

leads.issues: The homepage has no meta description tag at all, so Google auto-generates a search snippet instead. The opening paragraph of the 'Bakery/ Cafe' section also contains a real typo - 'an important park of the local community' instead of 'part' - right in the first block of copy a new visitor reads.
leads.opportunity: Writing a real meta description and fixing the typo are both same-day fixes. Expected within 30 days: a more trustworthy, professional first impression for New Farm locals searching for a bakery, and a proper search snippet instead of an auto-generated one.

leads.issues: 12 of the 14 photos on the homepage - including the entire portfolio gallery and the HGTV 'Build It Forward' feature image - have completely empty alt attributes. Only the logo has alt text. That's a real accessibility gap for screen-reader visitors and means none of the portfolio photos can surface in Google Image Search. Separately, despite being featured on HGTV, the homepage has no reviews or testimonials section anywhere.
leads.opportunity: Writing descriptive alt text for all 12 photos is a same-week fix. Expected within 30 days: portfolio photos become indexable in Google Image Search for searches like 'reupholstered chair Fairfax Station,' plus better accessibility compliance.
